title: SATUMER (Health Tourism Application and Research Center) Director's Message
content:
SATUMER (Health Tourism Application and Research Center) Director's Message

The Health Tourism Application and Research Center, which was established to serve the development of the country in the field of health, to bring together the relevant sector and demanders, to provide access to systematic information and information resources, aims to provide academic support and contribute to practical implementation strategies for our country to become a center of attraction in terms of health tourism as a result of its geographical location, affordable prices and health service delivery at international standards, together with the achievements achieved in the field of health.

In this direction, our center provides trainings for institutions and companies operating in the sector within the scope of incentives by signing protocols with the Ministry of Trade. With academic events, it brings the sector and academia together and tries to produce innovative ideas that will strengthen the field. SATUMER will continue to guide both sector organizations and employees and those who want to take part in this sector in order to contribute to the field of health tourism, which has an important share in our country as a sector and income.

Prof. Dr. Lecturer. Prof. Dr. Yusuf BAKTIR

SATUMER Manager
